$schema_note: Canonical pre-investment verification checklist. Rendered in the report. 'auto' items can be auto-checked when evidence exists in findings; 'manual' items are for the investor and their own independent counsel to confirm before wiring funds.

items.text: Regional center is active and in good standing on the current USCIS approved RC list (and absent from the termination list).
Project's I-956F has been approved by USCIS (or, if pending, confirm the filing receipt and date).
Job-creation count provides a meaningful cushion above 10 jobs/investor, with a defensible economic methodology.
Reserved-category set-aside (rural / high-unemployment / infrastructure) is independently confirmed and currently valid.
Confirm the 2-year sustainment / at-risk period and exactly when your capital is deemed deployed.
Read the redeployment clause; confirm it is same-RC, NCE-consistent, and protective of investors.
Sponsor / RC has a prior I-829 (conditions removed) approval track record.
An independent fund administrator and annual audit are in place (RIA compliance), and I-956G is being filed.
Your own source-of-funds path is fully documented and routed through non-sanctioned channels.
Capital stack confirmed from independent records; EB-5 is not the first-loss tranche and not a majority of the stack.
Read the loan/equity terms: rate, maturity, security, and whether repayment is contractually defined.
Collateral is recorded (first lien where claimed) and guarantees are from a creditworthy, independent guarantor.
Developer track record and balance sheet checked against EDGAR/PACER/news; no undisclosed defaults or bankruptcies.
Construction status verified (permits/entitlements, GC, contract type); completion risk understood.
Market demand supported by an independent study, not just the issuer's projections.
Identify the repayment/takeout source and stress-test it (LTV, DSCR, refinance feasibility).
Read the escrow agreement: when are your funds released, and to whom?
Fee schedule and related-party map reviewed for stacked/affiliate fees and self-dealing.
Sponsor has a history of actually returning EB-5 capital on prior deals.
Engage YOUR OWN immigration attorney and financial advisor — independent of the issuer and of the attorney who proposed the deal.
Resolve every UNVERIFIABLE claim in this report by obtaining the underlying primary document before wiring funds.
